name: Scotland Oat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to desired temperature.
2. Mix all dry ingredients (honey, salt, gluten, oat bran, whole wheat flour, bread flour, and oat flour) in a large bowl.
3. Add wet ingredients (milk, water, applesauce, and yeast) to the dry mixture and stir until combined.
4. Grease a pan according to your preference, or use vegetable oil if desired.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake according to recipe specifications in "Bread in Half the Time" by 264.
